title: Problem-Solving Puppets
description: A conflict repair game where kids help puppet friends share, take turns, use words, ask for help, and name mid-conflict feelings.
learningGoals: Practice peaceful repair strategies for common classroom conflicts
Name feelings during a conflict before choosing what to do
Hear modeled words for sharing, turn-taking, apologies, and inclusion
interactionModel: choose-one tap a large repair strategy or feeling card after a performed spoken puppet scene
feedbackModel: Constructive repair choices sparkle with spoken modeling; feeling misses wiggle gently and replay the scene.
credits: Emoji placeholder puppet props and shared character portraits. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
